title: Vendor landing-zone sign-off slips, delaying the first cutover
description: Northwind has not delivered written landing-zone sign-off. If it keeps slipping, the OrderHub cutover window cannot be committed to the sponsor, which cascades into the Billing and Reporting cutovers and erodes the slack against the 2026-12-31 data-center backstop.
mitigation: Weekly vendor sync with a named owner and a committed date; escalate to the sponsor with the contract backstop attached if it slips again.
trigger: Verbal-only confirmation persisting past the card's own deadline (already occurred on 2026-05-29).
residual: Even with sign-off on 2026-06-04, the cutover-window calendar is tight; a second slip would likely force a phase into the next month.
